body_transformation: The metallic sheen transforms into molten gold armor plating with magma-cracked textures across its compact boxy body, while the red joint accents become glowing crimson fissures. The curled spiral tail tip now emits a flickering ember glow with smoke trails curling from its tip. Small ears develop a heat-haze distortion effect around their edges, and the four legs retain their low stance but now feature molten gold paw pads with subtle ember sparks. The light blue and white highlights shift to amber glows along the body's seams and joints.
signature_feature: Tail tip: molten gold ember with smoke trails and flickering crimson sparks.
